applied.location: Section 2 calibration table 'Galgo stranger-approach success, day 1 | 0.02'
applied.action: Replaced fabricated 0.02 figure with qualitative 'forbidden (passive-only); no numerical day-1 success rate published' at low confidence; updated exec-summary galgo prior sentence to Normando p=0.009 language; added explicit note in Section 2 Knowledge Gaps that the 0.02 figure was a synthesizer inference and has been removed.

Added microchip RTO differential (71% vs 39%, n=13,794, Kremer 2021) to Section 1 narrative with operational implication for chip-status branching the urgency-decay function; added calibration table row.

Added dedicated magnet-dog paragraph with Kody/Phoebe/Winnie case citations, mechanism (tunnel vision via conspecific attention bypasses predator-mimicry), deployment trigger, and two-track framing (food-lure parallel).

Qualified to 'returned zero for fearful-dog crowd-success cases'; explicitly acknowledged Weiss 49%/Lord 34.8% gregarious-dominated counter-stream; reframed asymmetric-cost as fatal-vs-suboptimal not fatal-vs-zero.
Rewrote to acknowledge that false-fearful classification forgoes 49% Weiss neighborhood-search channel and can push past 72h cooperative window — materially suboptimal, not costless.
Rewrote to surface conditional: breed governs gate at initialization, yields to individual signals, and is least predictive on agonistic-threshold dimension specifically.

applied.location: Section 1 narrative vs code Phase 1 contradiction
applied.action: Tightened narrative: Phase 1 behavior can persist past 72h but engine treats 72h as escalation threshold. Removed the 5-7 day speculative extension.

Added explicit acknowledgement that the case-mix assumption is assumed-not-measured and that first ~100 Nona cases must log intake temperament + outcome to validate; included exit ramp for gregarious-dominated case mix.

Added galgo intake-type modulation sub-rule: home-raised stable-home galgos drop to sighthound_other tier (24h camera-first window); maximum-trauma protocol applies only to unknown/recent-rescue/trauma-signal galgos.

applied.location: Section 4 decision matrix gregarious Phase 1 row
applied.action: Edited row to match the Section 3 code's four conjoint conditions (sighting <30 min AND dog stationary with finder for broadcast permission).
Added explicit invalidation condition to Knowledge Gaps: zero lost-podenco GPS telemetry; if first 20 Nona podencos show <2km median displacement at 48h, prior must be revised downward.

Added cortisol-half-life-vs-fear-conditioning mechanism paragraph: 60-90 min plasma half-life vs days-to-weeks amygdala-hippocampal imprinting; chronic HPA beyond 24-48h produces qualitative neuroplastic change.
Expanded to 4-tier Buddha Dog ladder (gregarious 0.50 / mild-aloof 0.75 / fearful-history 0.90 / trauma-puppy-mill 0.99) keyed to owner-reported history.

Split scent-hound row into pointing (5-10+ km upper end) vs retrieving (2-5 km lower end) per Albrecht 1999 + added Section 2 narrative paragraph on Benediktová 2020 active-homing (59% tracking / 33% scouting).

Expanded 'Required positive actions' from single sentence to explicit 6-step MAR sequence (get low / no eye contact / sideways / lip-smack with crinkly packaging / drop food / SING if prior failed calls); added Lacey-Elvis and Murphy-hat case names.

Expanded protocol narrative to enumerate 4 sub-protocols: scent-article anchor at escape point within 4h; canned-with-gravy food spec; bungee-tied open door for multi-day comfort phase; 2 consecutive days camera-confirmed feeding before arming; 1-3h monitoring intervals; landowner permission. Reconciled 20ft vs 50ft distance ('within ~20 feet').
Expanded from single mention to documented dose-response: Cheyenne WY → CO → WY → CO geographic ping-pong with 'never settled because of human interference' causal claim.

Added owner-at-escape-point as highest-yield Phase 1 opportunistic-gregarious owner action (unwashed clothing + water + food); explicit reversal for Phase 2+ / xenophobic per Buddha Dog familiar-stimulus paradox.
Tightened from 4 paragraphs to 1 paragraph; kept Nona-as-research-dataset beat + added UI surface and volunteer-routing implications from width-10.
Added 3-4 sentence paragraph in Section 1 narrative deriving P1 60-70% / P2 20-25% / P3 5-15% from Kremer + Lord + Weiss + Huang transfer; explicit gregarious-dominated caveat and hard-case shift.
Added knowledge-gap acknowledgement in Section 1: Albrecht 2002 not retrievable; findings derived from IAABC 2024 review + MAR practitioner literature (1997-present).
Added 'ASPCA-affiliated' to first Weiss 2012 mention; added Lord 2007 34.8%/15.2% recovery-method breakdown in same paragraph.
Added paragraph in Section 2 covering scent hounds, toy breeds, herding, guardian, and mixed/unknown categories; explicit practitioner-consensus tags where peer-reviewed data absent.
Expanded Section 2 Knowledge Gaps to address SQ10 explicitly (PubMed/Semantic Scholar checked, no controlled breed-stratified study exists); added herding/guardian inferred-from-function caveat.

Reworded so operational rule (food/scent lures fail at peak arousal) is primary; olfactory shutdown and sympathetic-mediated appetitive suppression listed as alternative candidate mechanisms; generalized to xenophobic Phase 1 cases.
Rewrote row to preserve 'assume permanent for name' default while making Lacey/Murphy non-name-signal workaround discoverable from table alone.
Added prefix sentence before λ rows stating they are reasoned-from-adjacent-domain starting points that must be refit once Nona has 50+ sighting-quality × outcome pairs.
Added Grab-bite 69%, Kill-bite 46%, Possess 31% rows with operational notes (caught prey may be guarded).
Added galgo 1.8m enclosure-height equipment spec; added HARTT 2-mile pre-mapping operational workflow to Section 3 Layer 1.
Added inline evidence-tier tags ([practitioner consensus], [peer-reviewed adjacent], [anecdotal case series], etc.) to Section 4 Knowledge Gaps.

notes: All 29 findings addressed via surgical edits. Several minors were merged with overlapping major findings (e.g., depth pointing/retrieving with width-04; depth galgo trauma sub-classifier with dialectic galgo sub-protocol; depth Lord recovery percentages with instruction ASPCA attribution; width-08 herding/guardian thinness with instruction SQ10; width-10 conclusion overlap absorbed into trimmed Forward Implications). No findings rejected as regeneration-scale. No findings escalated to orchestrator.
